sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53021" key="kampulo/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καμπῠλό-εις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, poet. for <sense id="n53021.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καμπύλος, ἴτυς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.28</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Jul.Aegypt.).</sense> </entryFree>
